title: The Credit Balance Myth Draining $92K From You
hook: Most Americans think carrying a credit card balance builds their credit score faster — that's 100% false, and believing it could cost you $92,000.
angle: Debunking the most persistent credit card myth using actual FICO scoring logic plus the real compound-loss math banks never show you
audience: Anyone with a credit card who has ever kept a balance to 'build credit' — tens of millions of Americans
key_numbers: 56% of Americans believe carrying a balance boosts their credit score
$92,000 — what that $1,362/year becomes if invested at 5% for 30 years
